full_text:
Gao Shang 高尚
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Gao Shang (高尚). Urged Zhongli Mu to remain on defensive against Guo Chun. Gao Shang was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom.
